root.command: CREATE TABLE HolidayClosureTbl ( ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, ClosureDate DATETIME NOT NULL, DaysClosed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, AppliesToPrep YESNO NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, AppliesToDelivery YESNO NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, ShiftStrategy TEXT(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Forward', Description TEXT(255) )

INSERT INTO HolidayClosureTbl (ClosureDate, DaysClosed, AppliesToPrep, AppliesToDelivery, ShiftStrategy, Description) VALUES (#2025-09-24#, 1, TRUE, TRUE, 'Backward', 'Public Holiday - Heritage Day');
INSERT INTO HolidayClosureTbl (ClosureDate, DaysClosed, AppliesToPrep, AppliesToDelivery, ShiftStrategy, Description) VALUES (#2025-12-19#, 14, TRUE, TRUE, 'Backward', 'Year-end Shutdown');
